scripts.preinstall: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const files=['package-lock.json','yarn.lock']; for (const f of files){ try{fs.unlinkSync(f);}catch{}} const ua=process.env.npm_config_user_agent||''; if(!ua.startsWith('pnpm/')){ console.error('Use pnpm instead'); process.exit(1); }"
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
